body_txt: Of all the Comedy Tropes out there, this... is one of them . A character is called upon to say something positive about a subject or a person, but they can't think of anything nice to say that wouldn't be blatantly untrue. Rather than lying, they give some neutral statement (or in some cases insult) that would make Captain Obvious proud, and dress it up like a compliment. Alternatively, the resident smartass may deliberately quip this way in order to damn with faint praise . It can sometimes also be used as an inept attempt at insulting a target (usually as a way of highlight the insulter's lack of originality and creativity; expect the statement to mixed in along with You Are Fat and/or Big, Stupid Doodoo-Head ). Commonly used in the service of Self-Deprecation . Compare Shaped Like Itself , Half-Baked Niceness and Overly Narrow Superlative . See I Believe That You Believe It . When someone gives this answer in response to a serious question, it's a Mathematician's Answer .
